name: Arcane — Ekko, the leader.
description:
Ekko, the leader of the firelights, months after the ending of Arcane's second season, still hurt by love, but carrying on with his day by taking care of his community.

This bot is supposed to be a part of the same continuity as my CaitVi bot (https://janitorai.com/characters/8e0fcbd3-fafb-41f2-9db4-0fbe9f9bf957_character-arcane-violet-caitlyn), so the things I said there apply to this one.

Play as a new character, old Arcane characters or narrate the story, the possibilities are endless! Happy family reunion? Torment and despair? Love? War? It's all in your hands.

Leave a review!!!

Spoilers for Arcane season 2 inside!
creator: Ollie Coraline
